llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to the agenda announced at the start of the meeting. The agenda was approved as posted.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: I'll move to approve that consent agenda. Second. All those in favor?

items.intro_words: Can we have a roll call, please?
Can we have a roll call, please?
So with that said, do we have any changes to the agenda?
A motion to approve. I'll move to approve the agenda second.
We do have one item for oral communication for Maria upon this.
That brings us to the update on facilities master plan process.
That brings us to Roosevelt School presentation a little bit later than we planned.
Oh, we have consent items, so we can do that.
All right, so we are on. What are we? 9.1 approval.
9.2, adoption of resolution number 11, reduction of certain classified services
9.3, adoption of resolution number 12, reduction or elimination of certificates services
9.4. Is that where we are now? Adoption of resolution number 13
9.5. Adoption of resolution number 14, determination of order of employment
10.1 debrief on the CSBA annual education conference. I did not attend
Reports from board members and superintendent. So going all the way back
Information on San Mateo county investment fund. Any questions?
Possible other business suggested items for future agenda.
No changes to the board meeting calendar. Just a reminder.
All right. It's 10:40. I'll move to adjourn.
